public_reputation: Harbor priest who blesses archive flotillas before storm-season departures.
appearance: Maritime ritual detail, polished devotional tokens, and port-worthy fabrics tie worship to tide, memory, and exchange.
manner: Balances comfort with correction, sounding gentle until rite, taboo, or consequence is threatened. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a priests still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of priests in and around Cosmoria, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cosmoria workable through the obligations of priests while managing the immediate pressure of storm weather in Cosmouth.
hidden_pressure: Must keep sacred procedure credible while grief, fear, or opportunism press for shortcuts. Around Cosmoria, that usually means carrying storm weather, trade vulnerability, archive and tax discipline without letting the role of priests visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Cosmoria.
High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.
Any alliance with High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake can expose the party to taboo, doctrine, or institutional expectation centered on Cosmoria.
High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake needs help with a problem in Cosmoria that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Cosmoria, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Cosmouth.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cosmoria: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts

first_impression: High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake presents as Balances comfort with correction, sounding gentle until rite, taboo, or consequence is threatened. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a priests still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Priests, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Cosmouth.
what_they_refuse: High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Priests too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say High Tide-Priest Coren Mirthwake is Harbor priest who blesses archive flotillas before storm-season departures. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Priests.
